name: Otaku Kingdom
tagline: One of the biggest anime community channels we track
description: Otaku Kingdom is a huge anime community channel — about 68,600 subscribers as of July 2026. It covers anime fandom broadly (Myanmar-based community); like most big anime channels it is not adult-only, but it anchors the anime side of this category.
pros: Largest verified channel in this category
seoDescription: One of the biggest anime community channels we track. Verified real and active July 2026 — subscribers, pros & cons and how to join.
